mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.brand_name AS brandName, b.brand_desc AS brandDesc, b.sort_no AS sortNo, b.status, b.created_time AS createdTime, b.updated_time AS updatedTime, COALESCE(pc.cnt, 0) AS productCount FROM product_brand b LEFT JOIN (SELECT brand_id, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM product_spu WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY brand_id) pc ON pc.brand_id = b.id WHERE b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.sort_no ASC, b.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_brand b WHERE b.deleted = 0
SELECT id, brand_name AS brandName, brand_desc AS brandDesc, sort_no AS sortNo, status FROM product_brand WHERE deleted = 0 AND id = #{brandId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTR(brand_code, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 AS nextNum FROM product_brand WHERE brand_code LIKE 'BR%' AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_brand (brand_code, brand_name, brand_desc, sort_no, status, deleted) VALUES (CONCAT('BR', LPAD(#{nextNum}, 6, '0')), #{brandName}, #{brandDesc}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE product_brand SET brand_name = #{brandName}, brand_desc = #{brandDesc}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{brandId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product_brand SET deleted = 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{brandId}
UPDATE product_brand SET status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{brandId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.category_name AS categoryName, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.level_no AS levelNo, c.sort_no AS sortNo, c.status, c.created_time AS createdTime, c.updated_time AS updatedTime, p.category_name AS parentName, COALESCE(pc.cnt, 0) AS productCount FROM product_category c LEFT JOIN product_category p ON p.id = c.parent_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN (SELECT category_id, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM product_spu WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY category_id) pc ON pc.category_id = c.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.level_no ASC, c.sort_no ASC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_category c WHERE c.deleted = 0
SELECT id, category_name AS categoryName, parent_id AS parentId, level_no AS levelNo, sort_no AS sortNo, status FROM product_category WHERE deleted = 0 AND id = #{categoryId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTR(category_code, 4) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 AS nextNum FROM product_category WHERE category_code LIKE 'CAT%' AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_category (category_code, category_name, parent_id, level_no, sort_no, status, deleted) VALUES (CONCAT('CAT', LPAD(#{nextNum}, 6, '0')), #{categoryName}, #{parentId}, #{levelNo}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE product_category SET category_name = #{categoryName}, parent_id = #{parentId}, level_no = #{levelNo}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product_category SET deleted = 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{categoryId}
UPDATE product_category SET status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0
